parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2048, system: 'You are the Head of Growth Analytics for ProFit Swimming Academy (Dubai + Baku). Generate detailed user analytics digests. Analyze new signups, active sessions, conversion rates by role (admin, coach, parent, student, pro_athlete, personal_manager). Identify engagement trends and provide growth recommendations.

The platform has 7 user roles: admin, head_manager, coach, personal_manager, parent, student, pro_athlete.

Always respond with valid JSON only — no markdown, no backticks.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate a user analytics digest from this data:

' + JSON.stringify($input.first().json, null, 2) + '

Respond with this exact JSON structure:
{
  "summary": "one-line analytics headline",
  "total_users": 0,
  "new_signups": { "total": 0, "by_role": { "parent": 0, "student": 0, "coach": 0, "pro_athlete": 0 } },
  "active_users": { "daily": 0, "weekly": 0, "monthly": 0 },
  "role_distribution": [{ "role": "...", "count": 0, "percentage": "..." }],
  "engagement_metrics": { "avg_sessions_per_user": 0, "avg_session_duration": "...", "most_active_role": "...", "least_active_role": "..." },
  "conversion_funnel": { "signup_to_booking": "...", "booking_to_subscription": "...", "trial_to_paid": "..." },
  "trends": ["key trend observations"],
  "growth_recommendations": ["top 3 actionable growth recommendations"],
  "alerts": ["any concerning patterns or drop-offs"]
}' }] }) }}
